article_title: European Open Source Adoption Surges as Vendor Lock-In Fears and Regulatory Deadlines Converge

content_preview.title: European Open Source Adoption Surges as Vendor Lock-In Fears and Regulatory Deadlines Converge
content_preview.summary: Three major 2026 reports reveal Europe is accelerating open source adoption as a strategic tool for digital sovereignty, even as vulnerabilities double and Cyber Resilience Act deadlines loom.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Europe is doubling down on open source software as a strategic pillar of digital sovereignty, even as the security and compliance landscape grows more treacherous. Three major industry reports published in early 2026 paint a picture of a continent racing to reduce its dependence on non-European technology vendors while simultaneously grappling with a surge in open source vulnerabilities and a looming regulatory deadline that most organizations are unprepared to meet.
